title: WA Robot Agents Configure Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot agents configure' without '--dry-run'. Returns per-agent config mutation results plus aggregate counters.

total.description: Total agents processed in this configure run

created.description: How many config files were created from scratch

updated.description: How many existing files were appended to or had the FrankenTerm section replaced

skipped.description: How many files were already current and therefore skipped

action.description: Action taken for this agent (for example create, append, replace, skip, or error)

filename.description: Target file path; project scope is workspace-relative, global scope is absolute when the detected root can be resolved

backup_created.description: Whether a backup file was created before mutating an existing file

error.description: Error message when the per-agent operation failed
